desc: In this small multi-file deep-equal library (src/), the deep-equal function wrongly reports arrays of different lengths as equal when the shorter array is a prefix of the longer one — e.g. dequal([1,2],[1,2,3]) returns true instead of false. The bug is somewhere in this small multi-file library; find the right file, locate the broken array-comparison logic, and fix it so tests/dequal.test.ts passes.
